events.summary:
Intent: node-graph workflow driven cinematic synthesis | Cinematic sunrise over Addis skyline, warm haze, slow dolly push. | Anchor the opening in pride, calm momentum, and authentic local detail. | memory context -> character: Grounded lead with calm confidence and subtle expressive reactions.; environment: Soft urban dawn atmosphere with active street life.; lighting: Directional warm key with controlled shadow falloff.; camera: Steady cinematic camera language prioritizing confident push-ins. | timeline override -> Hold sunrise for emotional breath before motion picks up. | shot graph -> Shot 01: Dawn Push(wide, slow dolly-in) | route -> multi/refine_then_render -> comfyui, flux | weight: calm | motion node: slow cinematic push
Output must remain compatible with the selected template and SDXL pipeline.

Output must remain compatible with the selected template and SDXL pipeline.

Intent: high-fidelity cinematic still-motion synthesis | Cinematic sunrise over Addis skyline, warm haze, slow dolly push. | Anchor the opening in pride, calm momentum, and authentic local detail. | memory context -> character: Grounded lead with calm confidence and subtle expressive reactions.; environment: Soft urban dawn atmosphere with active street life.; lighting: Directional warm key with controlled shadow falloff.; camera: Steady cinematic camera language prioritizing confident push-ins. | timeline override -> Hold sunrise for emotional breath before motion picks up. | shot graph -> Shot 01: Dawn Push(wide, slow dolly-in) | route -> single/still_image -> flux | emphasis: calm | slow cinematic push
Output must remain compatible with the selected template and SDXL pipeline.

Intent: premium beverage packaging
Subject guidance (product_box): Single premium rigid product box (carton), upright rectangular silhouette, front panel facing camera, crisp edges and corners, clear box geometry, single-object product presentation, commercial packaging photography emphasis.
Style guidance (swiss_industrial): Swiss grid discipline, industrial minimalism, precise geometry, neutral palette, clean negative space.
Constraints (clean_background): Use a clean, uncluttered background with minimal texture and no distracting elements.
Output must remain compatible with the selected template and SDXL pipeline.
